title: elatostema pellionianum var. novae-brittaniae
intro: Elatostema pellionianum var. novae-brittaniae, also known as the New Britain Elatostema, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. This plant is native to Papua New Guinea and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elatostema pellionianum var. novae-brittaniae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat wounds, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally to harness its health benefits.
